decision_rules.thumbnail_replace: >=1000 impressions, age >= 7 days, CTR at least 2 percentage points below target
decision_rules.retention_floor: averageViewPercentage below 40% triggers hook or scene audit
decision_rules.topic_promote: CTR at least 2 percentage points above target in first 72 hours
decision_rules.cadence_gap: channel views/day down 20% with publish gap above 4 days

summary.note: No metric-based growth actions yet; wait for public videos and Analytics data.
